item.title: AWS API Gateway from Beginner to Expert ?
item.description: Master AWS API Gateway from the ground up. Learn how to create, deploy, and manage RESTful and HTTP APIs. Explore advanced features like authentication, rate limiting, caching, and integration with AWS services.

item.title: Firewall Configuration (Max Opsec)
item.description: Learn how to configure Windows Firewall for maximum operational security, implementing default-deny policies, blocking attack vectors, and maintaining essential functionality.

item.title: Ansible Handlers Explained Real-World Use Cases & Examples test
item.description: Deep dive into Ansible handlers with practical examples. Learn when and how to use handlers for service restarts, configuration reloads, and other idempotent operations.

item.title: Securing Sensitive Data in Terraform
item.description: Best practices for managing secrets and sensitive data in Terraform configurations. Learn about using environment variables, AWS Secrets Manager, HashiCorp Vault, and other secure methods.

item.title: Boost Your AWS Security with Terraform: A Step-by-Step Guide
item.description: Step-by-step guide to implementing robust security practices in AWS using Terraform. Cover IAM policies, security groups, VPC configurations, encryption, and compliance frameworks.

item.title: How to Load Input Data from a File in Terraform?
item.description: Learn different methods to load external data into Terraform configurations. Explore file(), fileexists(), and data sources.

item.title: Sample Project 1
item.description:
Project Overview

This is a sample project that demonstrates how projects are structured in the portfolio. Each project can have detailed information, technologies used, and links to GitHub and live demos.

Features

  • Feature 1: Description of feature
  • Feature 2: Description of feature
  • Feature 3: Description of feature

Technologies Used

  • React: Frontend framework
  • Node.js: Backend runtime
  • MongoDB: Database

Project Details

Add detailed information about your project here. This section can include:

item.title: About richard mussell
item.description:
Welcome to my e-portfolio! I’m richard mussell, a passionate DevOps engineer and cloud infrastructure specialist with extensive experience in modern software development practices.

Professional Background

With years of experience in the tech industry, I specialize in building scalable, reliable, and efficient infrastructure solutions. My expertise spans across containerization, orchestration, infrastructure as code, and cloud platforms.

Core Skills

  • Kubernetes & Container Orchestration - Designing and managing containerized applications at scale
  • Terraform & Infrastructure as Code - Automating cloud infrastructure provisioning and management
  • Ansible Automation - Configuration management and application deployment automation
  • AWS & Cloud Platforms - Architecting and deploying solutions on major cloud providers
  • Docker & Containerization - Building and optimizing container images and workflows
  • CI/CD Pipelines - Implementing automated testing, building, and deployment processes

Mission

Cloud, DevOps, SysAdmin. My goal is to share knowledge, contribute to the open-source community, and help others navigate the complex world of modern infrastructure.

item.title: Contact
item.description:
Have a question or want to collaborate? I’d love to hear from you!

Contact Form

Contact Information

  • Email: contact@richardmussell.com
  • LinkedIn: Connect with me
  • GitHub: View my code
  • Twitter: Follow me

Note: Replace YOUR_FORM_ID in the form action with your actual Formspree form ID, or use another form handler like Netlify Forms if hosting on Netlify.

item.title: Page 1 - Projects
item.description: This page showcases 7 projects. Each project demonstrates different aspects of my work and expertise.
